evals.prompt: Entre nesse projeto, sincronize o GitHub e me diga rapidamente o que eu preciso saber para comecar a trabalhar sem gastar muito contexto.
evals.expected_output: Safely fetches remote metadata without pull/merge, reads high-signal files only, reports repo/GitHub state, project shape, commands, rules, risks, and next moves in a compact brief.

evals.prompt: Faca uma entrada token efficient neste repo. Tem mudancas locais, entao nao faca nada que possa sobrescrever trabalho.
evals.expected_output: Starts with git status, preserves dirty state, avoids destructive git operations, reads local instructions and manifests, and highlights local changes in the Project Entry Brief.

evals.prompt: Quero um briefing inicial desse monorepo, com GitHub sync, PRs abertos, comandos principais e quais docs devo ler depois.
evals.expected_output: Uses GitHub CLI or fallback metadata, maps apps/packages/services from high-signal files, lists commands with evidence, and explicitly names docs skipped/read to save tokens.

evals.prompt: Estou numa pasta sem acesso ao gh autenticado. Ainda assim entre no projeto e me de o melhor mapa possivel.
evals.expected_output: Reports GitHub access limitation, continues with local git/docs/manifests, avoids auth troubleshooting unless requested, and marks remote PR/issues/CI as unknown.
